prompt: A luxury fashion editorial ad collage for LOEWE, shot in a moody high-end magazine style. Center a seated young woman wearing an oversized black leather coat and black leather gloves, posed slightly forward with crossed arms and tousled dark hair blowing in the wind. Her face is mostly obscured and de-emphasized, creating an anonymous editorial feel. She holds or rests a black leather handbag with a gold chain and a dangling gold anagram charm. Place the large white serif wordmark LOEWE prominently across the center of the image, overlapping the model. Build the background as a dramatic outdoor scene at dusk with a cloudy sky, rocky ground, and a sculptural stacked stone pedestal on the left topped with a large gold abstract monogram ornament. Compose the whole image as a torn-paper mixed-media collage with exactly 5 visible material fragments surrounding the main figure: 1 black embossed leather swatch at bottom left, 1 warm brown leather swatch with embossed logo at lower left foreground, 1 cream woven fabric swatch at bottom right, 1 dark olive textured torn-paper panel on the right side, and 1 small beige leather swatch layered over the right side panel. Use a muted earthy palette of black, charcoal, bronze, cream, brown, and stormy blue-gray, with cinematic lighting, rich texture detail, premium product-photography finish, and a refined surreal luxury campaign aesthetic.
